expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Users need a notification center where they can see unread badges, open a notification list, mark notifications read or unread, filter by read state, and clear all read notifications. Store read state so it persists across sessions.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add read state to notifications schema",
      "description": "As a system, I need to store notification read state so it persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Read state column added to notifications",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend logic for notification actions",
      "description": "As a system, I need backend support to update notification state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend supports marking notifications read or unread",
        "Backend supports clearing all read notifications",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show unread badges in notification center",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see unread badges so I know if I have new notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Unread badge is visible in the UI",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Display notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to open a notification list to see my notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list UI is visible and populated",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add mark read/unread controls",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications as read or unread from the UI.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Controls to mark read/unread are present",
        "Actions update the backend state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add read state filter",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter control allows viewing read or unread notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add clear read notifications action",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Clear action is visible",
        "Triggers the backend clear logic",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
